summary: Error handling is inconsistent across layers. 8 swallowed exceptions found, no resilience patterns detected. 12 I/O operations lack error handling.

swallowed_exceptions.context: Payment gateway timeout caught and logged but not re-raised or handled

missing_error_handling.description: External webhook POST with no timeout or error handling

cross_boundary_leaks: DatabaseError leaks from repository to API layer in UserController

recommendations.title: Add error handling to unprotected webhook calls
recommendations.description: Wrap external POST calls with timeout, retry, and error handling

recommendations.title: Eliminate swallowed exceptions in payment service
recommendations.description: Re-raise or handle payment gateway errors meaningfully
